criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent to which the app utilizes artificial intelligence to enhance the shopping experience.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, developer documentation, user reviews.

criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average user rating of the app on app stores.

criteria.name: Number of Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of times the app has been downloaded.

criteria.name: Feature Set
criteria.description: Range and quality of features offered by the app.

criteria.name: User Experience
criteria.description: Overall user experience and interface design quality.
